message:
✨ Add anonymous user ID and auth_mode for GA4 cross-deployment tracking (#1262)

- Hash user ID with SHA-256 + salt via Web Crypto API to create an
  anonymous, deterministic, irreversible user_id for GA4
- Same user on localhost, cluster, and console.kubestellar.io produces
  the same hash, enabling cross-deployment journey analysis
- Add auth_mode user property (github-oauth | demo) to segment by auth
- No PII is collected — only anonymous hashed IDs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
